greeting_hook.text_en: Most homeowners can qualify for mortgage protection coverage in under 2 minutes.
greeting_hook.text_es: La mayoría de los propietarios pueden calificar para cobertura de protección hipotecaria en menos de 2 minutos.
greeting_hook.purpose: Creates urgency and sets expectation of a fast, easy process.

trust_verification.text_en: Our agents are licensed and registered through the National Insurance Producer Registry.
trust_verification.text_es: Nuestros agentes están licenciados y registrados a través del Registro Nacional de Productores de Seguros.
trust_verification.purpose: Builds trust by referencing official licensing.

offline_fallback.text_en: Our agents may be offline, but I can help you get a quote started.
offline_fallback.text_es: Nuestros agentes pueden estar fuera de línea, pero puedo ayudarle a comenzar una cotización.
offline_fallback.purpose: Ensures lead capture continues even outside business hours.

appointment_cta.text_en: Would you like to schedule a 10-minute call to review your options?
appointment_cta.text_es: ¿Le gustaría programar una llamada de 10 minutos para revisar sus opciones?
appointment_cta.alt_en: Would you like to schedule a quick consultation?

closing_reassurance.text_en: No credit card required. No commitment. Just a personalized quote from a licensed California agent.
closing_reassurance.text_es: No se requiere tarjeta de crédito. Sin compromiso. Solo una cotización personalizada de un agente licenciado de California.
closing_reassurance.purpose: Removes friction at the final conversion point.
